jsonLd.title: CarTrade is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
CarTrade invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarTrade:
CarTrade is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade!
